name: Karsu
title: The Finisher
mechanicsDetail: Duelist Mechanics: Stall, Rush, Debuffs, Crit, Shards.

startingAbility.name: Snowpiercer
startingAbility.rawText: Loose a volley of 5 arrows at nearby enemies. Each arrow deals 25 (+100% Attack, +100% Magic) damage and inflicts 4 (+1 per 15 Attack Speed) Frost.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Falling Snow
rankBSpecializations.rawText: Snowpiercer fires 5 more arrows. After Stall (20), Snowpiercer arrows gain 25 (+25 per rank) Crit.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Warband
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On cast, permanently gain 1 Crit, 2 Attack, and 3 Attack Speed. At start of combat, other Duelists gain all stats gained from this ability. Backup.

rankBSpecializations.name: The Frostbite
rankBSpecializations.rawText: On auto attack, fire an additional arrow that inflicts 1 (+1 per 100 Attack Speed) Frost and deals 1 (+10% Attack)% of normal auto attack damage.
